message:
feat: structured test logging framework — TestLogger, assert macros, JSONL schema v1 (2dccg.11.6)

Adds test_log module (cfg(test)) with:
- TestLogger: per-test structured event collector with auto-dump on panic
- 6 event categories (Style/Render/Interaction/Degradation/Theme/Layout)
- 5 event types (AssertPass/Fail, StepStart/End, StateSnapshot)
- JSONL output with schema_v, test_id, elapsed_us, category, event, detail
- assert_style_eq! and assert_logged! macros for pass/fail logging
- summary() returning (pass, fail, total) counts
- 8 self-tests covering lifecycle, JSONL format, summary, schema stability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
